name: tichlabs-sgbv-agent
displayName: Tich Labs SGBV Case Management Agent
description: Trauma-informed SGBV incident triage, referral matching, risk assessment, and FHIR-interoperable case management agent. Built with Gemini 2.5 Flash and MongoDB MCP integration for rich case search and analytics.

tools.name: match_services
tools.description: Match SGBV incidents to appropriate referral services

tools.name: generate_fhir_bundle
tools.description: Generate FHIR R4 transaction bundles from incidents

tools.name: assess_risk
tools.description: Assess risk level and urgency of SGBV incidents

tools.name: store_case_document
tools.description: Store case narratives in MongoDB for search and analytics

tools.name: search_case_documents
tools.description: Full-text search across stored case documents in MongoDB

tools.name: aggregate_cases
tools.description: Aggregate case data from MongoDB for analytics

partner.name: MongoDB
partner.description: MongoDB Atlas MCP Server provides document storage, full-text search, and aggregation capabilities for case management analytics.
